nodes.title: 8.1 Role Header Format
nodes.text:
<physical_index_5>
## 8.1 Role Header Format
<physical_index_5>

<physical_index_6>
Software Engineer | Company Name (Series B SaaS, 150 employees) | Jan 2022 – Present
City, Country (or 'Remote')

- Add company context in parentheses if the company is not well-known: stage (Series B), sector (fintech), and size (150 employees). One line, parenthetical.
- Most recent role: 4–5 bullets. Previous roles: 2–3 bullets. Roles older than 7 years: 1–2 bullets or consider removing.
- Promote to top: the one bullet from each role that most directly mirrors the JD you're targeting.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.2 The Impact Bullet Framework
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.2 The Impact Bullet Framework

STRUCTURE: [Action Verb] + [What + How (technical specifics)] + [Result with metric]

EXAMPLE: Redesigned + the authentication service (Node.js + Redis session store) + cutting P95 login latency from 1.8s to 340ms for 800K MAU.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.3 The Four Metric Dimensions for SDE
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.3 The Four Metric Dimensions for SDE

- PERFORMANCE: Latency (P50/P95/P99), throughput (req/sec, events/day), error rate (%), uptime (99.9% → 99.99%). These are the most credible engineering metrics.
- SCALE: Users (DAU/MAU), data volume (TB/day), traffic (RPS), infrastructure size (pods, nodes, services). Scale signals that your experience is production-grade.
- COST: Infrastructure savings ($K/year), compute reduction (%), licensing eliminations. Financial impact resonates with both engineering managers and executives.
- VELOCITY: Deployment frequency (releases/week), CI pipeline time reduction (minutes), test coverage increase (%), PR cycle time. These signal engineering culture contribution.
- When you cannot find a hard metric: use scope. 'Used by 8 internal teams', 'adopted as the org-wide standard', 'reduced on-call incidents from 12/week to 2/week'.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.4 Strong Action Verb Bank (SDE)
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.4 Strong Action Verb Bank (SDE)

Architected • Engineered • Designed • Built • Implemented • Shipped • Deployed • Scaled • Optimized • Refactored • Migrated • Automated • Instrumented • Debugged • Integrated • Containerized • Orchestrated • Provisioned • Benchmarked • Open-sourced
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.5 Before vs. After — SDE Bullets
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.5 Before vs. After — SDE Bullets

|  **XVague (Never Write These)**
Worked on backend APIs for the product
Responsible for database optimization
Helped migrate services to the cloud
Fixed bugs and improved code quality
Wrote unit tests for the application
Worked in an Agile development team | **✓ Specific (Write These Instead)**
Built 12 REST endpoints (Node.js + PostgreSQL) for the core order management service, reducing client-side data fetching by 60%
Reindexed 3 high-traffic PostgreSQL tables and rewrote 5 N+1 queries, cutting average API response time from 1.4s to 210ms
Migrated 4 monolithic services to AWS Lambda + API Gateway, reducing infrastructure cost by $38K/year and eliminating 2 on-call incidents/week
Eliminated 220 production bugs across 3 sprints by introducing automated Jest + Supertest coverage from 4% to 81%
Increased unit and integration test coverage from 12% to 79%, reducing production regression incidents by 65% over two quarters
Led adoption of 2-week sprint cadence for a 6-engineer team, improving on-time delivery rate from 54% to 91% over two quarters  |
| --- | --- |
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.6 Demonstrating Seniority Through Bullets
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.6 Demonstrating Seniority Through Bullets

- Junior: 'Built X feature using Y technology' — shows execution ability.
- Mid-level: 'Designed and built X, improving Y by Z%' — shows ownership and impact.
- Senior: 'Defined architecture for X, led 3-engineer squad to deliver in 6 weeks, reducing Y by Z%' — shows leadership, design judgment, and measurable delivery.
<physical_index_6>

<physical_index_7>
- Staff/Principal: 'Set technical direction for X across 4 teams, establishing org-wide standard that reduced Y by Z%' — shows org-level influence.
- The gap between junior and senior bullets is not the vocabulary — it's the scope of ownership expressed.

---
<physical_index_7>
